items.title: The Reversal Curse: LLMs trained on "A is B" fail to learn "B is A" (2023)
items.summary: We expose a surprising failure of generalization in auto-regressive large language models (LLMs). If a model is trained on a sentence of the form “A is B”, it will not automatically generalize to the reverse direction “B is A”. This is the Reversal Curse. For instance, if a model is trained on “Vale
